name: workingtogether
description: Multiplayer for AI coding agents — collision avoidance + live file sync for Claude Code / Codex.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix packages/coordination-mcp-server install && npm --prefix packages/sync-relay install && npm --prefix packages/sync-daemon install
scripts.build: npm --prefix packages/coordination-mcp-server run build && npm --prefix packages/sync-relay run build && npm --prefix packages/sync-daemon run build
